metadata.description: Plan-first workflows for Claude Code and Factory Droid. Ships flow-next: zero-dep, spec-driven, Ralph autonomous mode.

plugins.name: flow-next
plugins.description: Zero-dependency, spec-driven agentic SDLC: durable specs, context-fit plans, re-anchored workers, adversarial cross-model review, and receipts. Includes 22 subagents, 23 commands, 28 skills.
